やあ、司令官君。今日も仕事に精を出しているね。<br>えらいえらい。:
Well, Commander-kun. Hard at work again today, I see.
Good, good~.
我が子を褒める母親のように微笑みかけてくるシラエス。<br>最近の彼女は毎日のよ:
Shiraes smiled down at him like a mother praising her child.
Lately, she had been visiting the command room nearly every day.
嫌々だけどな……というより、シラエス……<br>よく司令室に顔を出してるけど、大:
I wouldn't say willingly... anyway, Shiraes —
you've been coming to the command room a lot. You okay?
うん？ 大丈夫、とは？: Mm? What do you mean by 'alright'?
探索も仕事も手伝ってくれてるだろ？ エルフらしく、<br>１年ぐらい働かずにやり:
You help with exploration and work — don't you ever want
to take a year off and do your own thing, elf-style?
ふふ、これが私のやりたいことだよ。: Hehe. This is what I want to do.
少しでも長く君と過ごしたいんだ。<br>もっと君のことを知りたいからな。:
I want to spend as much time with you as I can.
I want to know more about you.
（い、いや……勘ぐりはよそう。シラエスは人間なら誰だって<br>大好きなんだ。別:
(N-no... don't read too much into it. Shiraes loves all humans.
It's not like I'm anything special to her...........)
別に俺じゃなくてもいいだろ？<br>シラエスが大好きな人間はこの基地に沢山いるし:
It doesn't have to be me, right?
There are plenty of humans you love at this base.
――いや、君に感じている好意は他の人間とは違う。:
——No. What I feel for you is different from what I feel for other
humans.
上手く言葉では言い表せないが、そう――特別な、好きだ。<br>君でなければ駄目な:
I can't quite put it into words, but yes — a special kind of love.
It has to be you.
迷惑だったかい？: Is that a bother to you?
い、いや……はっきり言われてちょっと驚いただけだ。<br>嬉しいよ、シラエス。:
N-no... I was just surprised to hear it said so plainly.
I'm glad, Shiraes.
君のことは、ゆっくり知っていこうと思っていた。だが、エルフの<br>時間感覚だと:
I intended to come to know you slowly. But by elven standards,
that would likely take decades... and that's not what I want either.
だから司令官君――今すぐに君のことを教えてくれ……: So Commander-kun — let me know you right now...
近づいたシラエスがそっと唇を重ねてくる。<br>そして彼女に導かれるようにして、:
Shiraes drew close and gently pressed her lips to his.
Led by her, he found himself stepping toward the bedroom——
